title: Lepisorus steniste
intro: Lepisorus stenipteris is a species of fern, specifically a type of lycophyte, commonly known for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Lepisorus stenipteris include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Lepisorus stenipteris include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Lepisorus stenipteris is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the form of essential oils and tinctures.
taxonomy: Lepisorus steniste belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the polypody ferns.
